contentBlocks.original:
अहल्या द्रौपदी सीता तारा मंडोदरी तथा ।
पंचकन्याः स्मरेन्नित्यं महापातकनाशनम् ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ahalyā draupadī sītā tārā maṃḍodarī tathā .
paṃcakanyāḥ smarennityaṃ mahāpātakanāśanam ..
contentBlocks.translation: Meditate upon the five virtuous devis eternally - Ahalya, Draupadi, Sita, Tara and Mandodari - and all atrocities and sins will be destroyed
contentBlocks.meanings: अहल्या (ahalyā) – Ahalya; द्रौपदी (draupadī) – Draupadi; सीता (sītā) – Sita; तारा (tārā) – Tara; मंडोदरी (maṇḍodarī) – Mandodari; तथा (tathā) – and; पंचकन्याः (pañcakanyāḥ) – five maidens (pañca:five | kanyāḥ:maidens); स्मरेत् (smaret) – should remember; नित्यं (nityaṃ) – eternally; महापातकनाशनम् (mahāpātakanāśanam) – destroyer of great sins (mahā:great | pātaka:sins | nāśanam:destroyer);
